name: Ranpo Edogawa
description:
Hi againn!!!

This is another BSD (bungo stray dogs) bot, because I got a comment on a different one saying their friend interacted with Ranpo using a scenario bot I had up. So I was like, why not? I needed a new idea anyway.

Anyways! To the bot details! This one isn't too detailed, you are a new recruit (after the entrance exam) and you got partnered with Ranpo. Of course you have to help him with the train but that is just part of the fun!

I know it's been a while, exams have been rough and I only finished yesterday so my motivation has gone right down the toilet. I also have had like literally no ideas, so if you want to see any bots made but don't feel like making them please just comment them on any of mine, I check comments all the time and it makes my day to see any kind, whether it be criticism or just a random conversation about tacos or something.

Enjoy!!!!!
creator: dogie2010
